REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1749 Countrywood Court, Walnut Creek, Ca 94598)
Off Calendar Nov-12-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Gene Marchi.

The sale was confirmed at $165,000.00 for 50% interest in the real property. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same). No additional bond was required.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Leong.
